skills.name: Doge Skill
skills.generatedCode:
await runtime.say('Here is an Image of a Doge');
await runtime.displayImage({ url: 'https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/en/5/5f/Original_Doge_meme.jpg', caption: 'Image of Dodge' });
skills.author: Desktop Builder

skills.name: Random Dog
skills.description: Shows a random dog on the display
skills.generatedCode:
await runtime.say('Here is a random dog i fetched from the web!');
await runtime.displayImage({ url: 'https://dog.ceo/api/breeds/image/random Fetch!', caption: 'Random Dog' });

skills.name: Photo Countdown
skills.description: Airo faces you, says a friendly line, counts down from 3, takes a photo, then asks whether to save it and whether you want another.
skills.author: Desktop Builder

lines: Ooh, photo moment. Let me line this up.
Okay, let us make this a good one.
Camera time. I am getting ready.
Got it. Want to save this one?
Nice. Should I save that photo?
Okay, I took it. Do you want to save it?

entry.title: Save this photo?
entry.subtitle: Say yes to save it or no to discard it.

lines: All set. Want to take another?
Would you like one more photo?
Should we try another shot?

entry.title: Take another photo?
entry.subtitle: Say yes for another photo or no to finish.

skills.name: Photo Save Prompt
skills.description: Faces the user, says a fun line, takes a photo, previews it briefly, and asks whether to save it.

lines: Okay, camera time.
I am ready for a photo.
Let me line up a nice shot.

entry.title: Photo Preview
entry.body: Your photo is on screen for 2 seconds.

entry.title: Save this photo?
entry.subtitle: Say yes to save it, or no to discard it and take another.

entry.text: Do you want to save it, or should I discard it and take another?

skills.author: Desktop Builder

skills.name: Photo Showcases
skills.description: Faces the user, runs a tight cached countdown, takes a photo, shows the preview, and waits for a spoken save answer.

lines: Ooh, photo moment. Let me line this up.
Okay, let us make this a good one.
Camera time. I am getting ready.
Here is the photo.
Okay, here is the shot.
Nice, here is what I got.

entry.title: Keep this photo?
entry.subtitle: Say yes to keep it or no to discard it.

lines: Okay, photo test complete.
Nice. That finishes the photo test.
All right, the photo flow test is done.
